title: If Evas were military vehicles
wikitext:
[]: If Evas were military vehicles...             Quote Post by PanzerEVA » Fri Jul 26, 2013 9:22 am Ok, so technically they already are military vehicles. But I can't stop thinking 'what if' the Eva's were simply tanks or battleships? I guess we have Eva-303 to blame for this. XD If Eva-00 was a tank, it'd be a Type 90 Kai, no question. Unit 01 would be a Challenger 2 (just coz). Unit 02, duh! A Leopard 2 what else? 03 and 04 would be Abrams. What do you think?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Fri Jul 26, 2013 10:08 am I think you and Kensuke would get along well.

[]:             Quote Post by PanzerEVA » Thu Aug 01, 2013 9:48 am OK, how's something I've got worked out. One of my many 'ideas', along with my IDS Conundrum thingy-ma-jig. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Aug 01, 2013 12:32 pm Why the fixation on F14s?

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Thu Aug 01, 2013 2:46 pm I'd guess because F-14s are the sexiest jet fighter America ever made.

[]:             Quote Post by PanzerEVA » Thu Aug 01, 2013 3:04 pm Or if you went to the fafiction area, you'd find out pretty quickly (psst, EVA-303)

[]:             Quote Post by Gob Hobblin » Thu Aug 01, 2013 3:22 pm TMBounty_Hunter wrote: I'd guess because F-14s are the sexiest jet fighter America ever made.

[]:             Quote Post by PanzerEVA » Thu Aug 01, 2013 3:51 pm In this universe I've diverged from the original, NERV is still a paramilitary corporation, but it's more mercenary in nature, so they have a 'budget' so to speak. I'm not going to go into full details, mainly because this is the wrong forum.

[]:             Quote Post by Gob Hobblin » Thu Aug 01, 2013 3:58 pm Well...if thinking of the Evas as military vehicles (like, VEHICLES, not cyborgs), what is the nature of their opposition? Still Angels? And if so, how would something like a regular vehicle be able to go toe-to-toe with them?

[]:             Quote Post by PanzerEVA » Fri Aug 02, 2013 2:59 am Way I see it, the ship EVA's are command and control. They house the entry plugs. There's still a crew and the ship is still able to be a normal ship. Under plug control, speaks for itself. All other EVA's need ship unit to be operational, so if Sea Unit 03 was destroyed, Aerial Unit 03 wouldn't work, but Aerial Unit 01 would. If you see what I mean. As for the opposition... Still not quite sure. Ammunition is how they fight, Lance-Enhanced munitions. Figure that one out. Here's an impression of Sea Unit 01: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Squigsquasher » Thu Aug 08, 2013 12:00 pm I can imagine an F15 Eagle in Unit 02 colours. But then Starscream transformed into an F15 so I am biased.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Thu Aug 08, 2013 1:02 pm Have the F-14 inspired VF-1 in Eva colors SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Melchior » Thu Aug 08, 2013 1:37 pm TMBounty_Hunter wrote: Have the F-14 inspired VF-1 in Eva colors SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by PanzerEVA » Wed Aug 14, 2013 9:23 am Made a load more. No jets as of yet, having difficulty with the drawing. But here, have these as instead! SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Tribblepoo » Wed Aug 14, 2013 9:34 am Gob Hobblin wrote: Then again, I think the A10 has them all beat, so that shows MY tastes.

[]:             Quote Post by PanzerEVA » Wed Aug 14, 2013 10:39 am Tribblepoo wrote: That thing is ugly as hell, but there's a certain elegance about someone figuring out how to make a tank fly.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Wed Aug 14, 2013 4:26 pm Would someone with the ability to edit forum threads mind removing that apostrophe in the thread title? It bugs the hell out of me every time this topic gets bumped.

[]:             Quote Post by PanzerEVA » Wed Aug 14, 2013 6:20 pm ^what's wrong with it? I've been thinking about what the MP Eva's could be. Some kind of MiG perhaps? T-55's?

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Wed Aug 14, 2013 6:34 pm PanzerEVA wrote: ^what's wrong with it?

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Wed Aug 14, 2013 6:38 pm PanzerEVA wrote: ^what's wrong with it?
